action.reasoning: Observation: XGBoost failed due to wrong objective name (reg:pseudohuber should be reg:pseudohubererror), CatBoost stopped too early (8 iterations) due to aggressive early stopping on MAE. Previous test IC was 0.0426 with validation IC 0.0744 showing overfitting gap. Analysis: 1) Fix XGBoost objective, 2) Disable CatBoost early stopping and select best IC iteration manually, 3) Use simple/rank average ensemble instead of IC-weighted (which overfits to validation). Decision: Rewrite train.py with fixed XGBoost, better CatBoost config, multiple LightGBM variants, and robust ensemble strategies.
